summary_en: FY3/26 final dividend raised to ¥21/share from ¥19/share; annual dividend to ¥37/share from ¥35/share. Increase driven by sales and profit exceeding guidance published 10 Feb 2026. Final dividend subject to approval at 124th AGM on 25 June 2026.
title_en: Notice of Revision (Increase) to FY3/26 Final Dividend Forecast
translation_en_brief: Press Kogyo announced on 15 May 2026 an upward revision to its FY3/26 final dividend forecast. The final dividend per share is raised to ¥21 from the previously announced ¥19, lifting the annual dividend forecast to ¥37 per share from ¥35. The increase reflects actual sales and profit results for FY3/26 exceeding the guidance issued on 10 February 2026. The final dividend remains subject to shareholder approval at the 124th ordinary general meeting scheduled for 25 June 2026.
